titleStmt.title: SII 34.284: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 284. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the north verandah of the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Bhūpati-Uḍaiyar (son of Bukkaṇa) = c. A.D. 1418.

Daṉmarāyaṉ the arasu of Chēndavaṉ-maṅgalam made a gift of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi in the village of Sāmanta-nallūr for offerings in the Tiruvaraṅguḷam temple. A second gift by the māṭāpattiyam of the temple is mentioned at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalēcuraṉ śrīvīrapukkaṇa Uṭaiyar kumāraṉ pūpati Uṭaiyārkku cellā
Irācarāca vaḷanāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭai
yaṉār Āticaṇṭēśvaratēvaṟku miḻalaikkūṟṟattu mēlkū
ṭu cēntavaṉmaṅkalattu Aracu ṅkattaraiyaṉ taṉmarāyarēṉ kumpilāvā
Amutu ceytaruḷa tirunāmattukkāṇi Āṭci yāka viṭṭa cāmaṉta nallūr vayal
ṟṟukkuḷattu vaṭakkil maṭaiyālam maṇikkuḷattil viṭṭa nilattil viḻukka
�lum nīrpāyum nilaṅkaḷukku perunāṉ kellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai ka
ḷar kuḷattukku mēṟkum teṉpāṟkellai liva varai lukku vaṭakku
paṭittāṉukku vaṭakkil ttam ceyyum mēlai vayalukku
Iraṇṭumākai ṉṉilaṅkaḷukku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai kuḷappuṟattukku viḷa
ṇṭār kuṭikkāṭṭukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai kāñci Ūr kuḷattukku pōki
12 kōmāya vāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Icainta peru nāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa
n=tirātittavarai cella Aṉupavikka kaṭavārkaḷum
rāka m nāṉē poruṭ collakkaṭavēṉākavum pāṭikāval kaṇakkuppe
potumakkaḷpēṟu peṟakkaṭavatākavum Iṉṉilattāl kaḷum pācippa
mum peṟakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kalveṭṭikkuṭuttēṉ Āti caṇ
vākku taṉamarāyarēṉ Ippaṭikku ceyalpaṭikkum cēntava
ṅkalam kumuṅkuṭi kāñci Ūr Ūravar coṟpaṭikkum mēlai ma
ṟṟu nāṭṭukkaṇakku ciṅkap perumāḷ muṉaiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
takkal veṭṭukkuṭpaṭṭa kaṇṇāṟṟuppōkkil nilattil Ikkōyilil māṭāpattiyam
tēvarkaḷ nāyaṉ Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ muṭikātta pāṇṭiya tēva ka
vatiram Āka viṭṭa nilam tillai mūvāyira vayakkalum kīḻaivātum
Ūṟaṇiyum cantirādhittaivarai Aṉupavittukkoḷḷakkaṭavarākavum
Ippaṭikku cīkāriyam kkāṇi cevārkaḷ tēvarkaṉmikaḷ kōyiṟkaṇakku
Inta Āvar coṟpaṭikku kōyiṟkaṇakku koṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
